info.title: E-Workflow API
info.description: API documentation for the E-Workflow service

tags.name: User Tasks
tags.description: APIs for claiming, reassigning, and completing user tasks

tags.name: Process Instances
tags.description: APIs for workflow runtime, task processing, and search

get.description: Return all versions of a workflow definition by workflow key

post.description: Create a new workflow definition version with its step definitions
Upload BPMN XML for an existing workflow definition version
Deploy uploaded BPMN of a workflow definition version to Camunda
Assign candidate user or candidate group to a workflow task
Start a new process instance using the latest active definition for the workflow key

patch.description: Reassign an existing task to another assignee and write assignment history
Complete a task, optionally save task data, and move workflow to the next step
Assign a task to an assignee, mark it as claimed, and remove all CANDIDATE identity links of the task after a successful claim
Allow claim only when the user is a valid candidate directly or through candidate group membership. After a successful claim, all CANDIDATE identity links of the task are removed

get.description: Return workflow definition details by definition id
Return deployment history of uploaded BPMN by workflow definition id
Get all wf_task_identity_link records for a workflow task

Return tasks that the user can claim directly as a candidate user or indirectly through candidate group membership. Tasks that are already claimed by another assignee or already completed are excluded
Return workflow instance details including step instances and tasks
Return the transaction progress timeline including total steps, step names, processor, current step, and step statuses
Search runtime workflow data by application name, workflow key, current step, workflow status, business key, and assignee
Return lookup data for workflow, step, and status dropdowns used by the search UI

stepCode.description: Unique step code inside the workflow

deployedBy.description: User who deploys the BPMN to Camunda

businessKey.description: Business key that links workflow to business object

formData.description: Detailed form data from frontend to initialize Camunda process variables

data.description: Business data payload stored into task data

username.description: Candidate username claiming the task for themselves

candidateSourceType.description: How the user can claim the task: directly as a candidate user or through candidate group membership

candidateGroupCode.description: Candidate group code when the task is claimable through a group

candidateGroupName.description: Candidate group name when the task is claimable through a group

processorFullName.description: Full name of the processor resolved from wf_user.full_name

assigneeFullName.description: Full name of the assignee resolved from wf_user.full_name
